description.default: AL Loop test with small database
description._description_: Short description used to describe the AiiDA workchain.

data_path._description_: Absolute path containing the AL Loop required files.

mace_settings_path._description_: Absolute path containing the MACE calculation settings in json format. (TO BE UPDATED)

init_db_path._description_: Path to the initial database file. This is the starting point for the active learning loop.

final_db_path._description_: Destination path for the final database file after the active learning loop completes.

md_steps._description_: Number of molecular dynamics steps to perform. This influences the simulation's duration and how many frames will be available to analyze later.

seed_size_frac._description_: Fraction of the dataset used as a seed for the active learning process. Should be between 0 and 1.

md_temperature_K._description_: Temperature in Kelvin for the molecular dynamics simulation. Affects the particles' kinetic energy.

md_timestep_duration_ps._description_: Duration of each timestep in picoseconds for the molecular dynamics simulation, measured in picoseconds. Smaller values increase accuracy but require more computational resources.

md_settings._description_: Settings for the MD to be performed using LAMMPS.

commitee_num_models._description_: Number of models in the committee used for uncertainty estimation in active learning. More models can provide better estimates but increase computational load.

max_iterations._description_: Maximum number of iterations for the active learning loop. Limits the length of the active learning process.

al_keep_frame_interval_perc._description_: Percentage of frames to keep for further analysis. Lower values reduce data storage and processing requirements.

al_settings._description_: Specific settings for the Active Learning procedure.
